source_document: FormQAR-054 Rev C — CooperSurgical PSUR template

rules.obligation: Render only the cadence-matching variant (annual 4×12mo OR biennial 2×24mo) of Table 1; delete the other.
rules.agent_instruction: Use _prefilled.table1_ready_rows verbatim. The pipeline already selected the correct variant for this device class.

rules.obligation: Table 7 grand total rate must equal total_complaints / total_units_sold × 100, computed from raw integers — never by summing rounded sub-category rates.
Every table cell must be populated. Use 'N/A' for text, 0 for counts, 0.00 for rates.
rules.agent_instruction: No blank cells. No bare dashes.

rules.obligation: Integers ≥1,000 use comma separators. Complaint rates in tables: 4 decimal places, percentage. Sales percentages: 1 decimal place.
rules.agent_instruction: Match the template's numeric formatting exactly.

rules.obligation: Remove all bracketed instructions, '(Remove if not applicable)' annotations, and 'Add or delete rows as needed' footers.
rules.agent_instruction: Do not echo template debris. Replace placeholder rows with actual data or remove.
